series_metadata.series_description: Files contain the complete history of the bank or trust company, including Articles of Incorporation, Amendments to Articles, incorporation material and related changes, initial organizational requirements to become licensed to conduct bank or trust business in Ohio.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain paper copy in operating area until imaged and indexed. Upon confirmation that paper copy was been checked for quality and completeness, then destroy. ; Microform: Retain microfilm in operating as well as off site storage facility for (5) five years after dissolution of bank or trust company., then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain electronic files for five (5) years after dissolution of bank or trust company, then destroy. Electronic records are to be backed up to electronic media daily., Paper: Shred ; Microform: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
